name: Quick Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sugar, milk, and oleo in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and boil vigorously for about three minutes.
3. Remove from heat; add the chocolate chips and vanilla.
4. Stir until thoroughly blended.
5. Pour hot over 9 x 13 inch or 10 x 15 inch pan of brownies or cake.
6. Allow to cool, as it will harden as it cools.
